title: Do it all in peaceful
description: A data pack that allows you to craft blaze rods, totem's of undying, and many more items that you can't normally get in the peaceful difficulty
body:
A data pack that allows you to craft blaze rods, totem's of undying, and many more items that you can't normally get in the peaceful difficulty # **Crafting:** ### Resin Clump recipe: ![Resin clump recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3afb203e9adc6255a8312a20715f153a80a0e383.jpeg) ### Slime Ball recipe: ![Slime ball recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/147201b23180ec7c896fbf2f672284893c0ba3e1_0.webp) ### Totem of undying recipe: ![Totem of undying recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cXKTHdty/images/990b9b17d3b8b7bc7b5d8c5cbdde87c12219ce13.png) ### Blaze rod recipe: ![Blaze rod recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65dffaf8837d78c3610cf7901c168e287203237b.png) ### Ender pearl recipe ![Ender pearl recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cXKTHdty/images/9f45efc4990a60c8b7a4e5690670867f19427075.png) ### String recipe ![String recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56c7f4679fed967cc6d23c167d97282b9f9c90ed_0.webp) ### Nether star recipe ![Nether star recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc2f518a9229bcd731955e6d5b0eef45693bc45c.png) ### Gunpowder recipe ![Gunpowder recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/599c329851ad4209b8faa36293bd358756bd14c6.png) ### Ghast tear recipe ![Ghast tear Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a823a5d9b46323f0684a6964fdaa9b9f17df1cc.png) ### Credits Developers: [@kc123552](https://modrinth.com/user/kc123552) Tools: [Misode Datapack Builder](https://misode.github.io) ### Art ### These images are used in the project icon [Delete icons created by Pixel perfect - Flaticon](https://www.flaticon.com/free-icons/delete)
[Tick icons created by kliwir art - Flaticon](https://www.flaticon.com/free-icons/tick)
